summary: Added a small temporal bridge into Christmas morning and a closing tactile echo so the Christmas-night ward discovery carries more directly into chapter 11's post-Christmas state.
edits: Adjusted the opening sentence to link the wake-up more directly to chapter 9's late-night Christmas Eve ending.
Revised the final sentence so the sensed strain in the wards follows Gavin back to bed and into chapter 11's 'since Christmas' condition.
